---
name: Check-latest-version
description: Use web search tools to double check the latest or current stable version of a framework/tool etc.
---

## Overview
This skill ensures that the model uses a web search tool to double check the current or the latest stable version of a framework/tool/cli tool etc.
The model should preferably search with the following query: "latest version of {name of the framework/tool/cli tool etc}" or "current version of {name of the framework/tool/cli tool etc}".

## Example
- When the user asks the model what the current/latest version of a certain app/framework/tool etc is, the model should use a web search/query tool.

## When to apply
- When the users asks for the current or latest version of something.
